title: Keep the main thread free to avoid ANRs
description: Run all I/O, database, and heavy computation off the main thread with coroutines/dispatchers so the UI never blocks.
body: Use when doing network, disk, database, or heavy work. Do not perform blocking calls on the main thread, and do not assume a quick call stays quick under load. Actions: launch work in a coroutine on Dispatchers.IO/Default (e.g. via viewModelScope), suspend rather than block, and update state on the main dispatcher; never run Room/network synchronously on the UI thread. Validation signals include no ANR reports and StrictMode showing no main-thread disk/network. Risk boundary: blocking the main thread for ~5 seconds triggers an Application Not Responding dialog and a kill; a main-thread I/O call is a reliability defect even when it usually returns fast, because it will stall under poor conditions.
